b7ff216f4eec6e58.title: Memory systems comparison v1
b7ff216f4eec6e58.summary: A vendor-comparison pre-registration retained as an inspectable withdrawal. It was never executed.

bb7cee596f94289b.title: Memory systems control arm
bb7cee596f94289b.summary: A control-arm pre-registration created before observation and withdrawn with the unauthorized vendor route.

bda4396c7638e63f.title: Artifact coherence transfer study v1
bda4396c7638e63f.summary: A prospective study invalidated before measurement after a protocol deviation and an independently identified detector defect.

e1c51ab0d83be772.title: Artifact delivery instrument v2
e1c51ab0d83be772.summary: A controlled instrument-validation study preregistered but blocked before probe entry because the required opposing review produced no verdict.

blocked.summary: Required opposing methodological review unavailable; no probe entry and no Evidence.

mechanisms.title: Canon envelope store
mechanisms.summary: Append-only, validator-gated records for Claims, Evidence, Decisions, Policies, and events.

mechanisms.title: Frozen promotion gates
mechanisms.summary: Evaluation thresholds are bound to Claims before observation and cannot be amended afterward.

mechanisms.title: Decision-backed publication guard
mechanisms.summary: The static build refuses result publication without a valid terminal Decision and intact canon lineage.
